sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73223" key="o(lo/knhmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλό-κνημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the whole shin,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκελὶς ὁ.</foreign> a ham <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing the whole leg,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:108:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
